message:
fix: update test mocks for onSettled callback + remove double-count bug (#7649)

PR #7640 added an onSettled callback to settledWithConcurrency but tests
mocked the function without invoking the callback, causing 74 test
failures. Update the vi.mock wrappers in useCachedData, useCachedISO27001,
and useCachedLLMd test files to invoke onSettled on each settled result.

Also remove the redundant "Final aggregation pass" in fetchFromAllClusters
that double-counted failedCount — the onSettled callback already handles
accumulation, so the post-loop re-iteration was both unnecessary and
broke the "all clusters failed" throw condition.

Fixes #7645

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
